nasb.text: He trusted in the Lord, the God of Israel; so that after him there was none like him among all the kings of Judah, nor among those who were before him.

esv.text: He trusted in the Lord, the God of Israel, so that there was none like him among all the kings of Judah after him, nor among those who were before him.

cnv.text: 他倚靠耶和華以色列的　神，在他以前或以後的猶大列王中，沒有像他的。

ccb.text: 希西迦信靠以色列的上帝耶和华，在他前后的犹大诸王没有一个可与他相比。
